title: Cab Ride
description: A cab ride booking application that allows users to easily book a cab for their transportation needs. The application provides a user-friendly interface where users can enter their pickup and drop-off locations, select the type of cab they want, and choose from various payment options. The app also includes features such as real-time tracking of the cab, estimated fare calculation, and the ability to rate and review drivers after the ride.
tech: Google Maps API (for location selection and real-time tracking)
Payment Gateway Integration (for processing payments securely)
LocalStorage or Backend Database (for storing user data, ride history, and driver information)
